# Title: 2026-03-07 — Phase 1 — Better Auth + Drizzle setup

- Status: IN_PROGRESS
- Phase: 1
- Branch: feat/phase-1-better-auth-drizzle-setup
- Owner: @
- Created: 2026-03-07
- Completion:

## Objective

Prepare local Postgres, Drizzle, and Better Auth CLI integration so the project can generate a Drizzle schema and apply migrations. This task covers DB connectivity, CLI-friendly auth config, and generating the initial Drizzle migration.

## Scope (SCOPE LOCK)

WHAT I WILL DO:

- Ensure local Postgres is running and matches .env.
- Create the dev DB and user if missing.
- Install Drizzle, drizzle-kit, pg, and Better Auth CLI locally.
- Provide a CLI-friendly `lib/auth.ts` export and run `npx @better-auth/cli generate`.
- Generate and apply Drizzle migrations using `drizzle-kit`.

WHAT I WILL NOT DO:

- Push commits or open PRs (no remote actions).
- Change production or remote infra.

## Plan (ordered steps)

1. Verify Postgres container and create `dev_db` (done).
2. Install required packages (bun add) (done).
3. Make `lib/auth.ts` CLI-friendly (done).
4. Run `npx @better-auth/cli generate` and save output into `db/better-auth-schema.ts`.
5. Merge generated schema into `db/schema.ts` and run `npx drizzle-kit generate:migration` + `npx drizzle-kit migrate:latest`.
6. Run repo verification (typecheck, lint, tests).

## Implementation Notes

- Keep `lib/auth.ts` lightweight for CLI import; provide `options` export and `initAuth()` runtime function.
- All changes committed to `feat/phase-1-better-auth-drizzle-setup` branch locally.
- Follow-up alignment work updated the setup to use the documented runtime pattern: `export const auth = betterAuth(...)`, `toNextJsHandler(auth)`, `createAuthClient(...)`, centralized env access, and server DAL helpers.
- Temporary CLI shim files were removed after the runtime config became compatible with `bunx @better-auth/cli generate --config ./lib/auth.ts`.

## Verification

- `docker exec -i saas-postgres psql -U user -d dev_db -c "SELECT 1"` returns 1.
- `npx @better-auth/cli generate` produces `db/better-auth-schema.ts`.
- `npx drizzle-kit generate:migration` and `npx drizzle-kit migrate:latest` complete without error.
- `bun run check:types && bun run lint && bun run test` pass.
